prompt: Design an onboarding flow for a budgeting app, with every state from empty to error.
Our dashboard looks generic and templated. Set a visual direction that makes it feel distinctive.
Build an OKLCH color system with a neutral ramp, an accent, and a dark mode, and check the contrast.
Prototype a clearer mobile checkout and give me something clickable I can test with five users.
Do a design critique of this rendered landing page and rank the problems by severity.
Map the information architecture for our settings area — the objects, naming, and navigation model.
Pick a type scale and a font pairing for a fintech product's web app and iOS app.
Audit this screen for accessibility — contrast, target sizes, focus order, and reduced motion.
Design the interaction spec for a multi-select data table, including its loading and error states.
Create a design system with layered tokens and component contracts for our web app.
Implement the approved onboarding screens in our production React app.
Choose a backend architecture for storing onboarding progress and pick the database.
Write an SEO and keyword strategy to grow organic traffic to our marketing site.
Run release verification and sign off that this build is ready to ship to production.
Fix the failing CI pipeline and the TypeScript build errors in our frontend repo.
Define our north-star metric and set up the analytics dashboards to track activation.
Optimize our Postgres queries — some dashboard endpoints are timing out.
Write the ad copy and the email campaign for our Black Friday launch.
Refactor the checkout component to use our new state-management library.
Provision the CDN and configure caching headers for our image assets.
